place: Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Tiered Beachfront Villa with Cliff-Edge Infinity Pool, Chaweng
note: Fully staffed · breakfast, welcome dinner & airport transfers included
blurb: A beachfront villa that steps six levels down a Chaweng headland to its own stretch of powder-white sand, a 22.5-metre infinity pool spilling toward a panorama jacuzzi and the Gulf beyond. Eight bedrooms plus two children's dorms, a home cinema, gym and spa sala — fully staffed with a private chef. From $1,880 a night.
detail:
Set right on the sand of a quiet Chaweng headland, this expansive residence cascades across six levels from the cliff to its own private beach, every room turned to the sea and the islands beyond. It is a house built for big gatherings — family and friends who want for nothing and need never leave.

The heart of it is outdoors: a 22.5-metre infinity pool that reaches toward a large panorama-view jacuzzi and, below, the powdery white beach. A poolside sala, sun loungers, a BBQ terrace and kayaks and paddleboards line the waterfront, while a harmonious flow of indoor and outdoor spaces links the levels.

Living is open-plan and breezy, opening fully to the deck and pool, with a dining room beside the full kitchen that seats sixteen inside and up to twenty out. Entertainment is generous — a TV room with a 75-inch screen, a beachfront outdoor cinema, a games room with table tennis, a fully-equipped gym and a massage sala for in-villa treatments.

Eight en-suite bedrooms are arranged across the floors — king rooms with sea views and indoor-outdoor showers, beachfront suites with terraces — alongside two children's dorms: a colourful bunk-bed room and another with six single beds for a stylish sleepover.

The villa is fully staffed with a manager, private chef, housekeepers, gardeners, a pool attendant and security. A daily breakfast, a welcome lunch or dinner with wine, spa vouchers, a farewell beachfront movie night and airport transfers are all included. Offered from $1,880 a night.
